results.text: The Team EP: The Team EP (stylized as The TEAM ep) is an extended play (EP) by American alternative rock band Local H. "The Team EP" is the first Local H release to feature drummer Ryan Harding, who joined the band in November 2013, and was initially sold exclusively at Local H concerts. Limited copies have since been made available online from G&P Records, the band's official merchandiser.
